ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the college */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was established */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the college */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial dataset */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_granularity" TEXT /* Granularity of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_datasets_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_debt" (
  "debt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student debt entry */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the debt entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the debt data is for */,
  "debt_amount" REAL /* Total debt amount for the year */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in debt from previous year */,
  "average_debt_per_student" REAL /* Average debt per student */,
  "median_debt_per_student" REAL /* Median debt per student */,
  "total_students_with_debt" INTEGER /* Total number of students with debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_debt_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition fees entry */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the fees entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fees data is for */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Total fees amount for the year */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in fees from previous year */,
  "average_fee_per_student" REAL /* Average tuition fee per student */,
  "median_fee_per_student" REAL /* Median tuition fee per student */,
  "total_students_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endowments" (
  "endowment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endowment entry */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the endowment entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the endowment data is for */,
  "endowment_amount" REAL /* Total endowment amount for the year */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in endowment from previous year */,
  "average_gift_size" REAL /* Average size of individual gifts */,
  "number_of_donors" INTEGER /* Number of donors */,
  "largest_gift" REAL /* Amount of the largest gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endowment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endowments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial trend entry */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college associated with the trend entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend data is for */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., student debt, tuition fees) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "trend_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level in the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the file is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the file is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the permission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, financial analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., student debt, tuition fees) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial type entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the financial type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial type (e.g., endowment, grant) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_types_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the financial data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data is for */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES financial_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
